zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger De Dethick於1402年出生在英國德比夏爾阿福時，他的父親William De Dethick III28歲，母親Elizabeth Derham24歲。他於1427年與Isabelle Auderbie在英國英格蘭諾福爾可喬加結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1461年在英國越可爾堂頓享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger De Dethick于1402年出生在英国德比夏爾阿福时，他的父亲William De Dethick III28岁，母亲Elizabeth Derham24岁。他于1427年与Isabelle Auderbie在英国英格兰諾福爾可喬加结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1461年在英国越可爾堂頓享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dethick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger De Dethick was born in 1402, in Ashover, Derbyshire, England, his father, William De Dethick III, was 28 and his mother, Elizabeth Derham, was 24. He married Isabelle Auderbie in 1427, in Wormegay, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1461, in Towton, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger De Dethick est né en 1402, à Ashover, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, William De Dethick III, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Derham, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Isabelle Auderbie en 1427, à Wormegay, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1461, à Towton, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger De Dethick 1402 in Ashover, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William De Dethick III 28 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Derham 24. Er hat 1427 in Wormegay, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Isabelle Auderbie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1461 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Towton, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger De Dethick è nato il nel 1402 nel Ashover, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, William De Dethick III, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Derham, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Isabelle Auderbie nel 1427, nel Wormegay, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1461, nel Towton, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger De Dethickが1402年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアアショバーで生まれた時，父William De Dethick IIIは28歳，母Elizabeth Derhamは24歳であった。1427年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクウオルメガイでIsabelle Auderbieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1461年にイギリスヨークシュアイアトウトンで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger De Dethick(이)가 1402년 영국 더비실르 애쇼버에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William De Dethick III(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Derham(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1427년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 워메가이에서 Isabelle Auderbie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1461년 영국 요르크실르 타우턴에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger De Dethick nasceu em 1402, em Ashover, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William De Dethick III, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Derham, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabelle Auderbie em 1427, em Wormegay, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1461, em Towton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger De Dethick родился в 1402 г. в местности ашовир, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени William De Dethick III было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Derham, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabelle Auderbie в 1427 г. в местности вормегеи, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1461 г. в местности тоутон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger De Dethick nació en 1402, en Ashover, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William De Dethick III, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Derham, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Isabelle Auderbie en 1427, en Wormegay, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1461, en Towton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años.
